title: Civil Protection (Declaration of State of Disaster: Rural and Urban Areas of Zimbabwe) (COVID-19) Notice, 2020
title_en: Civil Protection (Declaration of State of Disaster: Rural and Urban Areas of Zimbabwe) (COVID-19) Notice, 2020

provisions.title: Title
provisions.content: 1. Title This notice may be cited as the Civil Protection (Declaration of State of Disaster: Rural and Urban Areas of Zimbabwe) ( COVID-19 ) Notice, 2020.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: 2. Interpretation In this notice — “ COVID-19 ” means the Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCov), which is an infectious disease caused by a virus which, having emerged during 2019, was declared a global pandemic by the World Health Organisation on the 11th March, 2020; “ urban area ” means any area which is — (a) a municipal area, town area or local government area; or (b) a town ward of a rural district council or an area declared to be a specified area in terms of the Rural District Councils Act [Chapter 29:13] ', or (c) a township as defined in the Land Survey Act [Chapter 20:12]', “ rural area ” means any area outside an urban area .

provisions.title: Declaration of state of disaster
provisions.content: 3. Declaration of state of disaster In the wake of the declaration by the World Health Organisation of COVID-19 as a global pandemic, a state of disaster exists in all rural and urban areas in Zimbabwe with effect from promulgation of this notice.

definitions.definition: COVID-19 ” means the Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCov), which is an infectious disease caused by a virus which, having emerged during 2019, was declared a global pandemic by the World Health Organisation on the 11th March, 2020

urban area ” means any area which is — (a) a municipal area, town area or local government area; or (b) a town ward of a rural district council or an area declared to be a specified area in terms of the Rural District Councils Act [Chapter 29:13] ', or (c) a township as defined in the Land Survey Act [Chapter 20:12]',
